author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. Added TensorStorage::try_clone() — fallible clone returning FerrotorchResult instead of panicking on GPU backend errors
2. Added TensorStorage::try_clone_subregion(offset, numel) — extracts a contiguous subregion with proper offset handling for both CPU (slice) and GPU (host round-trip)
3. Fixed into_storage_and_shape to use fallible clones in all 3 ownership paths (Ok/Ok, Ok/Err, Err), eliminating panics on shared GPU tensors
4. Fixed non-contiguous path to preserve device via TensorStorage::on_device() (was returning CPU storage for GPU tensors)
5. All 3 offset-ignoring paths now correctly extract [offset..offset+numel] subregions
6. 837 ferrotorch-core tests pass. 5 pre-existing vision test failures unrelated to this change.
